openpgp_public_key_t(3) Library Functions Manual openpgp_public_key_t(3)

NAME

openpgp_public_key_t - OpenPGP public key packet data.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/crypto/gpg/openpgp.h>

Data Fields


uint8_t version
Packet version (should be 4). uint32_t created
Creation timestamp (Unix epoch). uint8_t algorithm
Public key algorithm (22 = EdDSA). uint8_t pubkey [32]
Ed25519 public key (32 bytes). uint64_t keyid
OpenPGP Key ID (last 8 bytes of fingerprint).

Detailed Description

OpenPGP public key packet data.

Represents the parsed data from a Public Key Packet (tag 6), containing algorithm, creation time, and key material.

Definition at line 91 of file openpgp.h.

Field Documentation

uint8_t openpgp_public_key_t::algorithm

Public key algorithm (22 = EdDSA).

Definition at line 94 of file openpgp.h.

Referenced by openpgp_parse_public_key_packet().

uint32_t openpgp_public_key_t::created

Creation timestamp (Unix epoch).

Definition at line 93 of file openpgp.h.

Referenced by openpgp_parse_public_key_packet().

uint64_t openpgp_public_key_t::keyid

OpenPGP Key ID (last 8 bytes of fingerprint).

Definition at line 96 of file openpgp.h.

Referenced by openpgp_parse_public_key_packet().

uint8_t openpgp_public_key_t::pubkey[32]

Ed25519 public key (32 bytes).

Definition at line 95 of file openpgp.h.

Referenced by openpgp_parse_armored_pubkey(), and openpgp_parse_public_key_packet().

uint8_t openpgp_public_key_t::version

Packet version (should be 4).

Referenced by openpgp_parse_public_key_packet().
